description: Use this to trace how a symbol is used throughout the codebase. Perfect for understanding impact of changes, finding all callers of a function, tracking down where a variable is modified, or analyzing dependencies. Distinguishes between definitions and references.

properties.description: Symbol name to find usages of (function, class, variable)
properties.name: symbol

properties.description: Optional repository filter - only search within this repository
properties.name: repository_id

properties.description: Optional branch filter - only search within this branch
properties.name: branch

properties.description: Type of usage to find (definition, reference, all)
properties.name: usage_type

symbol.description: Symbol name to find usages of (function, class, variable)

repository_id.description: Optional repository filter - only search within this repository

branch.description: Optional branch filter - only search within this branch

summary: Find all usages of a function, class, or variable
